MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT JOHAN VAN HOVE'S MOTION TO COMPEL RESPONSES TO FORM INTERROGATORIES (SET ONE).
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING, OFF CALENDAR. IT IS A DISCOVERY MATTER. PLEASE CALL AND CALENDAR IN THE DISCOVERY DEPT. SEE SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 10. (302/PJM/JU) Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600

MOTION TO COMPEL ATTENDANCE AT DEPOSITION
Off Calendar Jan-04-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Johan Van Hove's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and attendance at deposition is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses to form interrogatories within 15 days of notice of this order. Plaintiff is ordered within 15 days of notice of this order to contact counsel for defendant to schedule his deposition. The deposition shall be completed by February 5, 2007. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
